stocks.impact_theory: Netflix reported earnings that beat on revenue but issued cautious FY2026 guidance citing subscriber growth slowdown amid competition and content costs. Economic implications include reduced consumer discretionary spending in a high-interest environment. Market psychology: disappointment leads to profit-taking after recent highs. Historical parallels: Similar to 2022 post-password sharing crackdown selloff. Analogies: 1. Like a blockbuster movie flop after hype - expectations unmet. 2. Overextended runner hitting a wall in a marathon.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment shows panic selling (high mentions of 'miss', 'guidance cut'), web news highlights weak outlook vs. market rally. Overall market up but NFLX decoupled negatively.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Limited rebound opportunity +3-5% if market drags up; avoid new longs.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Strong short bias, potential 10-15% downside to $580 support; target $600.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader tech rally spillover, short squeeze if volume spikes.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings catalyst with consistent bearish sentiment across sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Abbott lowered full-year guidance due to supply chain issues and softer demand in diagnostics post-COVID. Implications: Highlights healthcare sector vulnerability to economic slowdowns. Psychology: Defensive stock selloff erodes safe-haven status. Parallels: 2020 guidance cuts during pandemic. Analogies: 1. Ship delayed in storm - supply woes. 2. Diet fad ending - demand normalization.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: High premarket volume drop, X posts on downgrade, news confirms guidance slash amid strong market.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for dividend yield ~2.1%, +4% to $107.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: FDA approvals or M&A rumors could reverse.

stocks.justification: Solid news but healthcare resilience tempers severity.

stocks.impact_theory: Bullish analyst upgrades citing Neutron rocket progress and NASA contracts amid space race hype. Implications: Boosts small-cap growth in defense/tech. Psychology: FOMO buying in speculative sector. Parallels: 2021 SPAC boom for space stocks. Analogies: 1. Rocket fuel ignition - momentum surge. 2. Underdog winning big game.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +12.7%, positive X buzz, aligns with market risk-on.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small short if fails $12.

stocks.justification: Analyst driven, high vol but volatile sector.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil prices sank below $97 on Iran opening Strait of Hormuz, easing supply fears from tensions. Implications: Lower energy costs boost economy but hurt producers' margins. Psychology: Relief rally in stocks, rotation out of energy. Parallels: 2020 oil crash on demand fears. Analogies: 1. Storm passing, winds calm. 2. Gas prices drop, road trip boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Geopolitical unwind, oil down, X/market sentiment shift to risk-on.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to major news event.

stocks.impact_theory: Broad market rally on de-escalation, AI hype continues; NVDA leads Nasdaq surge. Implications: Tech rotation benefits AI leaders. Psychology: Greed index high, momentum chasing. Parallels: 2023 AI boom. Analogies: 1. Jet engine in tailwind. 2. King leading the charge.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Market greed, Nasdaq +5%, positive sentiment divergence noted.
